title: CRM Configuration Manager - 2 years contract - S$Open
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented CRM Systems Administrator to lead the technical management, customization, and optimization of our admissions and recruitment platform. You will serve as the bridge between functional business needs and technical solutions, ensuring our system runs efficiently, provides high-quality data, and offers a seamless experience for all users.

Key Responsibilities:   

  • Configure and customize the CRM database, including form design, workflow automation, and user portal management.
  • Oversee data imports/exports and perform regular data cleansing. Ensure seamless integration between the CRM and other core enterprise systems. Build complex queries, dashboards, and automated reports to provide actionable insights for leadership. 
  • Manage multi-channel communication templates and automate scheduling for events and outreach campaigns
  • Act as the primary technical point of contact, providing user training, troubleshooting support, and translating business requirements into system features.

Required Skills & Experience:

  • Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, Business, or a related field.
  • Minimum of 2 years managing or implementing CRM systems (experience with Technolutions Slate is highly advantageous).
  • Working knowledge of HTML, CSS, and Relational Databases.
  • Experience with system integrations and data quality management.

If you are a highly motivated and skilled project manager looking for a challenging and rewarding opportunity, we encourage you to apply!

Interested candidates may apply through the application system or send to pekoh@morganmckinely.com. Shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to Morgan Mckinley Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.morganmckinley.com/sg/privacy-policy. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd
Koh Boon Sien

EA Registration No. R1110345

postedCompany.description:
As a global professional services recruitment consultancy, Morgan McKinley connects specialist talent with leading employers across multiple industries and disciplines.


Our promise to you

You can get the best advice for your career at Morgan McKinley. Our team of consultants have either have an educational background in their sector or have industry experience. We take the time to listen to your long term goals and provide you with honest feedback to help you realise them.

Over the years many people have progressed their careers with us both here in Singapore and internationally and our global presence gives us insight into the domestic and international  markets. In Singapore we specialise in Banking & Financial Services, Legal, Compliance & Audit, Finance & Accounting, IT, Project Management, Sales & Marketing, HR and Supply Chain & Procurement.
postedCompany.name: MORGAN MCKINLEY PTE. LTD.
